messages.content: Get both the weather and local time for Denver.

function.description: Get local time for a city.
function.name: get_time

response.body_raw:
{"choices":[{"finish_reason":"stop","index":0,"message":{"role":"assistant","content":"I'm unable to provide real-time weather and local time information for Denver. However, I can suggest some reliable sources where you can find this information:

1. **National Weather Service (NWS)**: You can visit the NWS website at [weather.gov](https://weather.gov) and enter "Denver" in the search bar to get the current weather conditions and forecast.

2. **Local News Websites**: Websites like [denverpost.com](https://denverpost.com) or [9news.com](https://9news.com) often provide up-to-date weather information and local news.

3. **Weather Apps**: You can download weather apps like Dark Sky, Weather Underground, or The Weather Channel to get real-time weather information for Denver.

4. **Local Time**: You can check the local time for Denver by using a world clock website or app, such as WorldTimeBuddy or TimeAndDate.com.

Please note that these sources may have slightly different times due to daylight saving time (DST) adjustments."}}],"created":1784559366,"model":"/Users/bbadmin/gguf/watt-tool-8B.Q4_K_M.gguf","system_fingerprint":"b10050-b15ca938a","object":"chat.completion","usage":{"completion_tokens":208,"prompt_tokens":20,"total_tokens":228,"prompt_tokens_details":{"cached_tokens":5}},"id":"chatcmpl-8AS5AcV7IRgdWLi3fkJmAHmfj5Vrnb6e","timings":{"cache_n":5,"prompt_n":15,"prompt_ms":54.912,"prompt_per_token_ms":3.6608,"prompt_per_second":273.1643356643357,"predicted_n":208,"predicted_ms":2345.231,"predicted_per_token_ms":11.275149038461539,"predicted_per_second":88.69062365285124}}
